pattern: Two-pointer scan from both ends, swapping only alphabetic characters while skipping non-letters in place.
hints: Non-letter characters stay fixed; only letters are rearranged.
Use two pointers from opposite ends; advance each past non-letters before swapping.
Swap when both pointers land on letters, then move both inward.

edge_inputs.description: specials at both ends, letters in middle
digits and punctuation mixed with uppercase and lowercase

stress.description: random mix of letters, digits, and punctuation
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits + '!@#$%-_=+'
    n = min(100, max(1, size))
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
